channel.title: Maine Legislature — Laws of Maine (Session/Chaptered Law)
channel.description: NEEDS SELECTOR REVIEW: this is a client-side JavaScript single-page app; the static HTML shell does not change when content updates, so page-fingerprint monitoring will likely under-report changes until the underlying API is identified.

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Legislature — Laws of Maine (Session/Chaptered Law)
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
